author: ivy
name: A Week of Dumb Fun v1.2
bootlegger: There may be duplicate Minions in play.

A drunk Alchemist or Lunatic Evil Twin & their opposing player know each other.
A drunk Alchemist or Lunatic Vizier is announced.
